channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) gains 6% as all constituents rise
item.description: Aave (AAVE), up 5.8% from Tuesday, joined Stellar (XLM) as a top performer.

item.title: Bitcoin rebounds during Iran war, but safe haven role unproven
item.description: Bitcoin is beating gold during the Iran war, but its dependence on liquidity cycles keeps the safe haven narrative in question.

item.title: Bitcoin bounces from 50-day trend line with $72K BTC price now key focus
item.description: Bitcoin traders agreed that BTC price action needed to retake $72,000 to open up the odds of further upside as gold and US stocks gained.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Draw in $2.5B in a Month, Close to Erasing YTD Losses
item.description: Bitcoin ETFs show "incredible fortitude" with $2.5B monthly inflows, erasing YTD losses despite a 40% price drawdown, experts say.

item.title: Cipher Digital stock rises 9% on new data center deal with Hyperscale tenant
item.description: The new 15-year hyperscale lease and $200 million in financing underscore the push into AI data centers.

item.title: Governments need CBDCs to improve financial inclusion among citizens
item.description: CBDCs bridge the 1.3 billion unbanked cash-digital divide. Governments must actively promote them as trusted, low-cost gateways to formal financial inclusion.

item.title: Morning Minute: Circle Plunges 20% Over Clarity Act Yield Changes
item.description: Circle just had its worst day ever, while the CFTC is building a task force for crypto, AI, and prediction markets.

item.title: Monument Bank to tokenize 250 million pounds of retail deposits in UK first
item.description: The deposits will remain interest-bearing, fully backed, and protected by the country's Financial Services Compensation Scheme.

item.title: Bitcoin’s refusal to fall signals crypto's underlying strength even as war risks linger
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 25, 2026

item.title: Irish Police Crack First of 12 Bitcoin Wallets in $418M Drug Seizure
item.description: Ireland’s Criminal Assets Bureau accessed 500 BTC worth $34 million with the help of Europol, breaking into wallets seized in 2019.

item.title: STS Digital unveils structured crypto platform with Kraken as distribution partner
item.description: The platform, which covers 400 tokens, is aimed at banks, family offices, and high-net-worth individuals and comes as digital assets face growing institutional demand.

item.title: ECB targets summer for digital euro standards: Cipollone
item.description: The ECB’s Piero Cipollone said the central bank wants key technical standards for a possible digital euro locked in by this summer so banks and merchants can prepare for the rollout.

item.title: Bitcoin retakes $71K as US sends Iran 15-point ceasefire plan
item.description: Bitcoin bounced back above $71,000 after US President Donald Trump’s administration sent a proposal to Iran aimed at ending the war.

item.title: Bitcoin nears $72,000 as rising open interest signals growing leverage in choppy market
item.description: BTC rises with equities while surging open interest and fading volatility point to leveraged positioning despite repeated rejections near $72,000.

item.title: Gold’s longest losing streak in a century meets bitcoin’s resurgence
item.description: As gold posts its worst run since 1920, bitcoin gains ground and outperforms, pushing the BTC to gold ratio 30% higher, since the Middle East conflict started.

item.title: Bhutan offloads another $37M in Bitcoin as sovereign wallet shrinks
item.description: Bhutan moved 519 Bitcoin from its state-linked wallet, extending a March drawdown that has cut its sovereign stash far below 2024 levels.

item.title: Pump.fun adds one-time cap on creator fee redirects to curb post-launch changes
item.description: The update allows one fee redirect per token, after which settings are permanently locked to prevent repeated post-launch changes.

item.title: Crypto broker Bitpanda launches blockchain to connect EU banks with tokenized assets
item.description: The Vienna-based firm is joining the growing race joins race to build compliant blockchain rails for traditional securities like equities and funds.

item.title: Indian court says ‘no case’ against CoinDCX founders in impersonation fraud
item.description: A Thane judge granted bail to CoinDCX co-founders Sumit Surendra Gupta and Niraj Ashok Khandelwal, finding no case against them.

item.title: Ripple joins Singapore sandbox to test RLUSD in trade finance
item.description: Ripple joined the Monetary Authority of Singapore’s BLOOM initiative with Unloq to test RLUSD and XRPL for programmable cross-border trade settlement in Singapore.

item.title: There's a huge $14 billion bitcoin options expiry this Friday and it points to $75,000 as price magnet
item.description: Bitcoin options worth billions of dollars will expire on Deribit this Friday at 8:00 UTC.

item.title: Irish police open Bitcoin wallet years after keys were apparently lost
item.description: A crypto wallet tied to a convicted drug dealer thought to have lost his wallet keys transferred 500 Bitcoin to Coinbase on Tuesday.

item.title: THIS GUY LOST $400M OF BITCOIN - BUT IT JUST MOVED Clifton Collins was an Irish drug dealer who bought 6,000 BTC in 2011-2012. In 2017, he was jailed and his belongings were sent to a dump by his landlord. Police never recovered the seed phrase. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBBcVVzWlVIOEdQTVJkMnZwUFhUejZBUkNFalNKTDBXa21vRVhoUVFjQmNvY1JrU2JDWS0td3NvRFE3UWlfWGlvYWVmLW5GXy1kWVl3SEppbmt6LWM?oc=5" target="_blank">THIS GUY LOST $400M OF BITCOIN - BUT IT JUS…

item.title: Crypto giant debuts oil trading, but it's a different model to Hyperliquid's perps
item.description: Leading crypto market maker Wintermute debuts WTI crude oil CFDs – an OTC derivative that lets traders speculate on oil prices 24/7.

item.title: Bitcoin exchange outflows show ‘genuine accumulation by investors’: Analyst
item.description: Ongoing accumulation of Bitcoin is likely one of the factors behind why the cryptocurrency is trading in a tight range, say crypto analysts.

item.title: Retail traders fare worse on prediction markets than sportsbooks
item.description: A new report from Citizens JMP says median losses are deeper on prediction platforms as retail traders face sharper, better-capitalized counterparties

item.title: Baltimore Becomes the Latest to Sue Elon Musk's X and xAI Over Grok Deepfakes
item.description: Baltimore's consumer protection suit against xAI will test whether local law can hold AI companies liable where federal regulation has failed.

item.title: Bitcoin steadies above $71,000 as oil falls below $100 after U.S. drafts 15‑point Iran peace plan
item.description: Brent crude fell 4.7% and Asian equities rallied 1.9% as Washington delivered a ceasefire proposal to Tehran via Pakistan, fueling the most sustained optimism since the conflict began a month ago.

item.title: Ripple taps Singapore's central bank sandbox to test stablecoin-powered trade finance with RLUSD
item.description: The pilot with supply chain firm Unloq under MAS's BLOOM initiative would trigger cross-border payments automatically when shipment conditions are verified, a use case that connects Ripple's stablecoin ambitions to a concrete commercial ap…

item.title: Cardano price indicator that once preceded a 300% rally is back
item.description: Two historically contrarian indicators are flashing simultaneously for ADA, with average holders deeply underwater and derivatives traders piling into the most aggressive short positioning in nearly three years.

item.title: Pharma firm Enlivex raises $21M for prediction market Rain token treasury
item.description: Enlivex says it acquired 3 billion Rain tokens at a discount and extended its option to purchase billions more discounted tokens until late next year.

item.title: XRP holds near $1.41 as range tightens, breakout setup builds
item.description: Traders are watching $1.38 support and $1.42 resistance as compression points to a potential move.

item.title: Bitcoin Depot CEO Departs Amid Broader Crypto ATM Crackdown
item.description: A swift reset in the crypto ATM operator’s leadership comes as regulatory oversight has hurt its core kiosk business.

item.title: Robinhood announces $1.5B share buyback as stock struggles in 2026
item.description: Shares in Robinhood fell to their lowest level this year on Tuesday as crypto and tech stocks are battered by geopolitical headwinds.

item.title: OpenAI kills off AI video app Sora after 6 months
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman reportedly said all its text-to-video models would be shuttered, and a $1 billion investment from Disney has also been cancelled.

item.title: Delaware Moves to Establish State Framework for Stablecoin Issuers
item.description: The proposal would create a state licensing regime for stablecoin issuers while bolstering Delaware’s position to attract digital asset firms.

item.title: Clifton Collins was once reported to have written his Bitcoin private keys on paper. When his house was cleared out, the paper was thrown away, and he lost access to 6,000 $BTC($423.5M). Now, it seems the lost keys may have been found — or maybe not al - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBhak5rdXVuWmtRN1Fwb2FVVXFGa1VDQ1ZpSFpmU1E0VWNPTnJ6N0VjU3BmcGxCbVJ1amhob0VVWl9XNVV2cC1ncGZ3XzBieURtbGdiU0xhRVAtU0kyTTZrRk13?oc=5" target="_blank">Clifton Collins was once reported …

item.title: Ethereum devs up security efforts with new ‘Post-Quantum’ team
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation-linked Post-Quantum team says while the quantum threat isn’t imminent, deploying a full solution without disrupting the network will take years.

item.title: NASA Pivots Artemis Program Toward Building Permanent Base on the Moon
item.description: The agency has outlined a three-phase plan for lunar infrastructure and says the effort will serve as a proving ground for future missions to Mars.

item.title: OpenAI to Shut Down Sora Video App, Derailing $1 Billion Deal with Disney
item.description: OpenAI will discontinue the Sora app and API, ending its AI video-generation platform months after launching the standalone product.

item.title: Rising US Treasury yields, war in Iran, rising inflation risk pressure Bitcoin price
item.description: Falling tech stock prices and rising bond yields have forced a rush for cash, preventing Bitcoin from gaining any bullish momentum.

item.title: Some people say gaming on a blockchain isn't coming back. Congrats to the Graveyard Hackathon winners: 1. Dungeons & Moles (a game on a blockchain) @ailto_sAgent 2. Protocol - @MarchantDev 3. Dreamprint - @DreamprintApp 🪦🪦🪦 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9fYVV6TldibGgtNENmVmZDc2tsRXJzbjMwS1FleW0wWGZEanhRMGNQSmlzdmxkZHhDTjhIYV9pX1RBSDZ5YkVSUThxYkVTYmFYRFQ0YVJuZWJsQXkyeWtn?oc=5" target="_blank">Some people say gaming on a blockchain…

item.title: Great to see more banks leaning into crypto and stablecoins. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9RZnNNcDZxQVp1clBnQXUwSHVYZGc4TUlqS1h1ZlAwSng0QUZ1S2Z2RE9Tei1WVUxBTml1OTZMbkhORXByRXUtQVIyTG9ZQ2lDRzlHdjdvWkJqT01hdWFmWVRKdG5xYVU?oc=5" target="_blank">Great to see more banks lea…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: 21shares sees active strategies shaping next phase of crypto ETFs
item.description: 21shares president Duncan Moir sees shifting investor demand and evolving product strategies pushing crypto ETFs and ETPs beyond passive exposure.

item.title: Robinhood reloads stock repurchase plan to $1.5 billion as shares continue in downtrend
item.description: Riding the crypto boom to become one of the 2025's hottest stocks, HOOD has shed more than 50% of its value since bitcoin topped in early October.

item.title: Circle Stock Dives as Rival Tether Secures Big Four Audit, Crypto Bill Threatens Stablecoin Yield
item.description: Circle (CRCL) stock plunged 20% on Tuesday as stablecoin rival Tether made a long-awaited move and Clarity Act speculation grew.

item.title: Bitcoin jolted modestly higher on Iran ceasefire report; oil tumbles 4%
item.description: An Israeli TV report said a one-month ceasefire could be announced soon.

item.title: BlackRock sees AI driving crypto’s next bull phase as altcoin interest fades
item.description: The asset management giant's Robbie Mitchnick said clients are focused on bitcoin, ether and only a few other tokens, and aren't looking for broad exposure. Rather, they see opportunity for crypto in artificial intelligence.

item.title: Circle taps African fintech Sasai to expand USDC adoption in cross-border payments
item.description: The move aims to integrate the second-biggest dollar-pegged stablecoin into regional payment networks to improve cross-border transactions and remittances.

item.title: JUST IN: Morgan Stanley's Amy Oldenburg said banks are expanding into Bitcoin and crypto after years of infrastructure development, not because of FOMO 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1WVnNYQTJCemVVOG1xbElGT1Y1RnRWa0dMOF9DSnNtenQ1QkhLclpra1NLTF9ITE1oTEwwNzJYV3J1YkZJV09acXNheW5ZN1pfZ2pILVh4WjhVMXVqS2J4T3VVaFh5Zmc?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Morgan Stanley's A…

item.title: CFTC chief launches innovation task force focused on crypto framework
item.description: The task force will work with industry participants to develop regulatory approaches for crypto, AI and prediction markets.

item.title: BNY CEO says the future of crypto runs through big banks
item.description: Robin Vince says large banks can bridge digital assets and traditional finance as trust and regulation shape the next phase of growth.

item.title: 'Fortnite' Maker Epic Games Reveals Mass Layoffs, Says AI Isn’t to Blame
item.description: Epic Games is laying off more than 1,000 employees as Fortnite engagement falls, but CEO Tim Sweeney says it's not AI's fault.

item.title: Russian Hacker Jailed for 81 Months Over $9M Ransomware Attacks
item.description: Aleksei Volkov facilitated dozens of attacks across the U.S. as an "initial access broker," causing over $9 million in actual losses.

item.title: CFTC Unveils Innovation Task Force Focused on Crypto, AI and Prediction Markets
item.description: The CFTC launched a new task force designed to create a clear framework of rules for technologies like AI, crypto, and prediction markets.

item.title: This is interesting because if you’ve been following this story, it’s been well reported that yield on passive stablecoin balances was a nonstarter from the beginning and unlikely to make it into the final deal. I think the @tether audit news may be playing into the - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5zNlNKbjZZU2NzTXRiSm83RlJyNzNnMWNIeDlzUHZxWjl2djJDX0FnUXBUR0dDa3ZFVml1TDAwbUhlS3FEcmlsanY0S3hiai1jRFF5dzVkZ2JEVHF5OW41OUE0VWxmQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">This is interesting because …

item.title: BMO Is First Bank to Join CME's Tokenized Cash Platform on Google Cloud
item.description: BMO joins CME Group and Google Cloud to enable 24/7 tokenized cash settlement for institutional clients.

item.title: Bitcoin Has Likely Bottomed as Strategy Shows Resilience Amid Plunge: Bernstein
item.description: The analysts highlighted Bitcoin giant Strategy's flagship preferred share as an alternative source of funding amid tepid market conditions.

item.title: Bitcoin has likely reached a floor and could rise to $150,000 by the end of 2026, according to Bernstein, which argues the cryptocurrency is being reshaped by a steady shift toward institutional ownership and financing - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1RVnhEZDZWT1ZadlIwLTJUM0o2MW92OFdndXp4Sk1BR1RxeC01cWdmcll4VUhQTkUxaTRqOFZiM1MtaHVzVGtPaE13Y0puUjRxbUlXZzdFWFVwZnlJMnc?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin has likely reached a floor and …
